title: Update files to adhere to new lint requirements

comments.body:
@rhatdan @lsm5 @jwhonce PTAL

Will cut 4.4.0 after this gets in.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [lsm5,umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Python changes LGTM but Cirrus is not happy
@cevich any idea what is going on with cirrus? All the other tests are green though
@umohnani8 could you be more specific please, all I see is green check-marks.
Oh is it all the "Build Parsing Results" code annotations?  You can ignore those.

got it, thanks!

@lsm5 @jwhonce @rhatdan this is ready, can I please get a lgtm
